title: Partial<T> — all props become optional
description: mion utility/partial.spec.ts — all properties become optional. Resolves to {name?: string; age?: number; createdAt?: Date}; reuses the object emit with allOptionalCode array-rejection guard.
notes: Resolves to an all-optional object shape, so the `allOptionalCode` guard kicks in: arrays, Date, Map, Set, RegExp are rejected at the top level even though `{}` is valid. Present properties still run their atomic checks (Invalid Date in `createdAt` fails).
generated: function YOw_XhdTJvV(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && (!Array.isArray(v) && Object.prototype.toString.call(v) === '[object Object]') && (v.name === undefined || typeof v.name === 'string') && (v.age === undefined || Number.isFinite(v.age)) && (v.createdAt === undefined || (v.createdAt instanceof Date && !isNaN(v.createdAt.getTime()))))}
